info.description: Multi-chain cryptocurrency custody service with deposit scanning, withdrawals, and webhooks
info.title: Vault Custody Service API

post.description: Creates an account and makes the caller its owner

get.description: Returns account details. Requires account membership (injected by AccountContext middleware).

patch.description: Updates account name or view_all_wallets flag. Requires owner or admin role.

post.description: Sets account status to 'archived'. Requires owner role.
Sets account status to 'frozen'. Requires owner role.

get.description: Returns all non-expired access tokens for the account. Requires owner or admin.
get.summary: List API access tokens for an account

post.description: Creates a named access token. The raw token is returned once — store it safely. Requires owner or admin.
post.summary: Create an API access token for an account

delete.description: Deletes an access token by ID. Requires owner or admin.

get.description: Returns all active members of the account with their roles

post.description: Adds a user to the account with the specified role. Requires owner or admin.
post.summary: Add a user to an account

delete.description: Soft-deletes the account_user membership. Requires owner or admin.
delete.summary: Remove a user from an account

post.description: Validates a TOTP code or recovery code and returns full JWT tokens
Sends a password reset link to the user's email if the address is registered
Validates credentials and returns JWT access + refresh tokens. If TOTP is enabled, returns a partial token requiring 2FA.
Revokes the current JWT and all active refresh tokens for the user
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair
Creates a new user account and sends a welcome email
Validates the reset token and updates the user's password

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's full name

get.description: Returns all accounts the authenticated user is a member of

post.description: Validates the current password and updates it

get.description: Finds a deposit address record by its on-chain address string. Optionally filter by chain.
Returns all supported blockchain networks with their native asset and confirmation requirements
Returns a paginated list of transactions with optional filters by chain, type, status, or user
Returns a single transaction by its UUID
Returns all deposit addresses assigned to a specific external user ID across all chains
Returns paginated transactions for a specific external user ID across all chains
Returns all wallets across all supported chains

post.description: Creates a new HD wallet for the specified blockchain. Only one wallet per chain is allowed.

409.description: Wallet for this chain already exists or chain is unsupported

get.description: Returns a single wallet by its UUID
Returns all deposit addresses generated for a specific wallet

post.description: Derives a new deposit address for a user from the wallet's HD key. Each call produces a unique address.

400.description: Invalid wallet ID or missing fields

422.description: Address generation not supported for MPC wallets

post.description: Signs and broadcasts a withdrawal synchronously using MPC co-signing. Passphrase is required to decrypt the customer's key share.
Registers a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications. Supported events: deposit.confirmed, withdrawal.confirmed, withdrawal.failed
